message:
feat(fcp-e2e): add arXiv compliance E2E tests and simplify Semantic Scholar suite

Add arXiv connector to the E2E compliance test infrastructure and
streamline the existing Semantic Scholar test suite.

Cargo.toml:
- Add arxiv feature flag and fcp-arxiv workspace dependency for
  arXiv connector E2E tests

arxiv_compliance_e2e.rs (726 lines, new file):
- Implement full arXiv connector compliance E2E test suite with
  deterministic mock-server tests covering default-deny behavior,
  valid capability token allow path, network guard constraint
  enforcement, and OAI-PMH endpoint compliance
- Exercise connector through the shared E2E harness with
  ArxivConnectorAdapter implementing the FcpConnector trait

semanticscholar_compliance_e2e.rs:
- Simplify configure() adapter to delegate directly to
  handle_configure() without manual introspection deserialization
- Remove unused imports (InvokeStatus, wiremock matchers)
- Remove redundant paper_search_response() fixture and the
  separate allow_valid_token connector suite test — the default
  deny compliance suite already validates the core capability
  enforcement path, and the removed test duplicated coverage
  with fragile mock setup
- Clean up remaining imports (ConnectorSuite, InvokeExpectations)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
